lesson.menu_desc: Presenting one person to another -- 29 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 5 -- Introducing & Presenting Other People -- This is... / Have you met...?
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Marcos Mansour | Aula 5 -- Introducing & Presenting Other People

listenings.text: Ladies and gentlemen, it is my pleasure to introduce our next speaker. This is Doctor Helena Costa, and she leads one of the most respected valuation teams in the region. She manages large international projects, and she works closely with banks and investors across three continents. We have a mutual goal today: to make valuation clearer and more reliable for everyone. On behalf of the organizing committee, I would like to welcome her warmly to the stage. Please join me in giving a big round of applause. The floor is yours, Doctor Costa.
